docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $780.00 FILED BY WILLIAMS, DACHE AS TO DEFENDANT MIYAMOTO, DANIELLE (RAVEN) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-26-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, DACHE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF DACHE WILLIAMS. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT DANIELLE (RAVEN) MIYAMOTO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
